violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw beef being stored about raw vegetables in the cooler on the cook-line.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth left out on the prep area used for making sushi.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Numerous pieces of cardboard used to store food and kitchen utensils on in the kitchen are not a cleanable surface. Blanket being used to catch grease underneath the fryer is not a nonabsorbent surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fronts, backs, and sides of the fryers need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. The sanitizing function on the dish machine was not working at the time of inspection and tested 0ppm when operated.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single-use cups were stored on the floor in the dry storage room.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The dish sprayer was leaking at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors and walls throughout the facility need to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee's shoes were being stored on the same shelf as food and cooking utensils on the cook-line.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. Visible light showing through the backdoor of the building leading to the outside.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)

Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
